scripts.build: npm run lint && rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r configuration dist/configuration
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf coverage
scripts.db:migrations:generate: npm run build && export $(cat ./configuration/.env | xargs) && typeorm migration:generate -d ./dist/src/repositories/MigrationsDataSource.js
scripts.db:migrations:run: npm run build && typeorm migration:run -d ./dist/src/repositories/MigrationsDataSource.js -t each
scripts.dev: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r configuration dist/configuration && NODE_ENV=development concurrently "tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "node --watch-path=dist --enable-source-maps --experimental-print-required-tla dist/src/main.js"
scripts.start:debug: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r configuration dist/configuration && NODE_ENV=development concurrently "tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "node --watch-path=dist --inspect --enable-source-maps --experimental-print-required-tla dist/src/main.js"
